title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT Technologies:
NIIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies!
